title: steiractinia sodiroi
intro: Steiractinia sodiroi, also known as Ecuadorian Stevia, is a perennial plant native to the tropical regions of Ecuador. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its antidiabetic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Steiractinia sodiroi include lowering blood sugar levels, reducing blood pressure, and protecting against oxidative stress and cell damage. Herbal preparations of Steiractinia sodiroi include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
